narrative:
Aberdeen Village (precinct in Brown County) has 951 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.6 percentage points.
